rationale: Educ. Code §21.040 governs powers and duties of the State Board for Educator Certification. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.040. GENERAL POWERS AND DUTIES OF BOARD. The board shall:
_note: Educ. Code §21.040 concerns educator certification board governance and has no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
